items.story_excerpt: Every day we rate how models fare against each other for specific use cases, so I thought: what if the roles were reversed? What if models could rate us — like Yelp, but the AI agents are the ones leaving the reviews. Try it out and let me know what rating your model gives you. https://rateahuman.xyz

items.story_excerpt: I'm curious. Do you use todo list app? pen & paper? or any digital apps you're using daily?
